title: CertOps Agent Protocol Message (STUB)
description: STUB frozen in Phase 0. Freezes only the outbound message envelope shared by every agent/executor message so the executor API and the future agent are not blocked. The agent is outbound-only (it polls the control plane); the control plane never opens connections to agents. Per-message bodies are specified in the agent protocol phase. Messages MUST NOT carry private key material (enforced by apps/api/utils/secretMaterial.js at the ingest boundary).

protocolVersion.description: Agent protocol semver the agent speaks.

messageType.description: register/heartbeat/claim/result/evidence. Bodies defined in the agent protocol phase.

clockOffsetMs.description: Agent-reported offset vs control-plane time, used for clock-drift detection (agent protocol phase).

body.description: Message-type-specific payload. Specified per messageType in the agent protocol phase.
